---
layout: default
title: "Parliament Stalled Amid Protests and Legislative Agenda"
date: 2026-07-22T03:56:05.147303+00:00
summary: "Opposition protests paralyze Parliament for a second day as the government faces mounting pressure over education policy and legislative disputes"
run_time_ist: "9:26AM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 9:26AM</p>


<h2 class="section-title">India National Politics</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Parliamentary deadlock:</strong> Both houses of Parliament remained adjourned for the second consecutive day as opposition parties continued protests, while the Lok Sabha prepares to debate the Supreme Court (Number of Judges) Amendment Bill.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I1</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I6</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMitwFBVV95cUxNQUYxU19CdTF3SnRScGZEM0ZsYTFKZ0RlRjlXS1NMbVhBWnZGd25zdk9Ya3JaX3RzYVQzTDBQWTlaRlRRbVE5ZWE3ZGVtV1lnMVRUX0pHRTJ0REhyWnBsTmFJaUJnSkM5UDh5Wkw1c3pUcDk1MWJvRHJhaEY1Tk9TNTVxWGVwUTlHeWoxU2JUbWhjYVVHMlg5cmpWdHJXeFh0dFZjb3ZjODA0RmJRcUxHRGxmeGxndW8?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I8</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Opposition coordination:</strong> MP Chowdry Ramzan participated in an INDIA Bloc floor leaders&#x27; meeting in Delhi to strategize against the government.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I2</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMingFBVV95cUxOcml5NnltNzlsenRqQU1UN1BtZE00Y2R3SjQ4YUc5a3gxdjZCTm5lMG1QQXg3SGMzZ2dMQy1JTkhOdUlQdXEzQXFsUzNyaGtlUDdyMmdCUGJUeDd2bmxmaXZ1Z2xUU21tRHkyYXNVRHN3VEF4ZlA1YnpUTmRIWDV1ck0wSEswQ3FCSmxBcmRBYVJPRVpmR0tkVGNlX0k1Zw?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I3</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Protest fallout:</strong> Authorities have filed four FIRs following a violent march by the CJP, with an investigation into social media activity currently underway.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I5</a></span></li>
</ul>

<h2 class="section-title">Policy and Institutions</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Education Minister under fire:</strong> Congress MPs and protesters are demanding the resignation of the Union Education Minister over paper leaks, while the Minister maintains the government is ready for a debate on the NEET issue.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMivwFBVV95cUxPMTJ4cnJYRjdhRUg2ZHJWeVNIV0NCYXlLUUtBUy13WlFGV2wwMVlfbzk5eVR1eXRaWGJtWFhFd080czlDemFYYS1OUXhFd1lfRGZzcjJ5SzRUMHRHSUxLQ1E2RHZ6bVpEQUFDaV9sRDlTb08yWWtjMDlQbjBfY1E5STlZTl81QVZwZW1pUk9HekpGc08yaHZqeWc1MGFna19MRzQ2MWZSWkNJZkxGMWx3T3ZvcWt3akExVnFxR1pERQ?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W1</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W2</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMitwFBVV95cUxNRzZoOTdxaEVkZzlBX2dma0Z3TC1MWVlTOXZkQ0FoRDRNVk4xdmlvTzhLR0RXVkdhS0hGeDd3LVhoSm1zOGVkVE5fRUN4TFAwWTRmcmI1T1Q1UVlwcG1iZW8yamxWSG83ajlFcy1zUk16UGJBWGZITnhoWTBCNDlBeTdoOUhtSTNBclBUVzRiQnVFMGlXbDJqMEJTa25VUFBJTmFleTdUV3lxSEFMbmRlWHFlcjJsZXM?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W3</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W4</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W10</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Judicial directives:</strong> The Supreme Court has advised against a third language policy in India and issued directives to establish an early release policy for elderly prisoners.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W11</a></span></li>
</ul>
